title: GAP-G: Write MIGRATION.md for URI scheme change
description: Why: This is a breaking change. Callers need a clear migration path.\n\nWhat: Create MIGRATION.md at repo root. Cover: what changed and why (RFC 3986 opaque URI, no authority component), the mechanical transformation rule (s|secretx://([^/]+)/|secretx:\1:|), before/after examples for all common patterns (env, file relative, file absolute, aws-sm, vault, pkcs11, etc.), note that the backward-compat error message in the parser will help detect old-format URIs at startup.
